summary: Comprehensive E2E testing of RUKOS_CRYPTO | HUB completed. Backend APIs working perfectly (15/15 tests passed). Frontend UI functional with proper dark theme implementation, crypto data integration, and user workflows. Minor authentication persistence issue identified.

integration_issues.issue: AI Assistant modal opens but may need authentication state verification for consistent access

passed_tests: Landing page loads with proper hero section and features
Dashboard displays all 4 crypto data cards (prices, ETF flows, whale activity, liquidations)
Mock crypto API endpoints working (BTC/ETH/SOL prices, ETF data, whale alerts, liquidations)
Posts page - create and view posts functionality working
Ideas page - create trading ideas with coin/direction/target/stoploss working
Chat page - send and view messages working
Settings page displays user info and Telegram integration placeholder
Sidebar navigation works correctly between all pages
Dark theme with orange/gold gradient colors properly implemented
All backend API endpoints functioning (auth, posts, ideas, chat, AI assistant, crypto data)
JWT authentication and user session management working
AI Assistant backend endpoint responds correctly with GPT-5.2
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (15/15 tests passed), Frontend: 95% (13/14 features working)
